headline: Builders FirstSource: Housing Recovery Will Be Gradual Even With Legislative Support
summary: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) jumped on the ROAD to Housing Act, but upside may be limited. Read here for a detailed investment analysis.

headline: Builders FirstSource and Gibraltar Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after both chambers of Congress passed the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act.
